subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon He Who conversed on Sinai hath established Himself upon the Throne of Utterance and calleth all who dwell within the realm of possibility unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه استوی مکلم الطور علی عرش البیان و  یدعوا  من فی الامکان الی
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @station of the Manifestation of God, @chastisement and requital
